summary: Iteration 18: JengaHQ migration testing complete. All 31 tests passed. Stripe has been fully replaced with JengaHQ for payment processing. JengaHQ runs in demo mode (auto-activates subscriptions). Credit-based rate limiting is wired into all AI routes.

minor.issue: stripe==14.3.0 still listed in requirements.txt but not imported anywhere - can be removed for cleanup

passed_tests: GET /api/health - health check returns healthy status
POST /api/auth/login - user login returns JWT tokens (regression)
GET /api/plans - returns 5 subscription plans with NO Stripe fields
GET /api/plans - plan credit allocations correct (starter:10, standard:75, pro:150, premier:600, ultra:2000)
POST /api/subscriptions/create-checkout - legacy endpoint forwards to JengaHQ
GET /api/subscriptions/current - returns active subscription with next_billing_date
GET /api/user/credits - returns credit balance, plan, tier features
GET /api/ai/credit-costs - returns credit costs per operation type
POST /api/ai/execute - generic AI op with rate limit + credit deduction
POST /api/ai/generate - AI generation with rate limit + credit check
No Stripe fields in plans response
No Stripe fields in user response
GET /api/ai/generate-stream - SSE streaming with rate limit + credit check (verified manually)
action_items: Optional: Remove stripe==14.3.0 from requirements.txt (not imported anywhere)
critical_code_review_comments: JengaHQ migration complete - no Stripe Python imports remain
stripe_service.py repurposed as billing helper (plans + credit costs) - no actual Stripe code
User model uses jenga_customer_ref and subscription_id instead of stripe_customer_id/stripe_subscription_id
SubscriptionPlan model has no stripe_price_id or stripe_product_id fields
Demo mode correctly auto-activates subscriptions when JENGA_API_KEY not set
Rate limiting enforced on all AI routes via _enforce_rate_and_credits()
Credit deduction working - credits_used incremented after AI operations
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 17
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified JengaHQ migration. Stripe fully removed from backend (no imports). JengaHQ runs in demo mode when JENGA_API_KEY not set - auto-activates subscriptions. Credit-based rate limiting works on all AI routes. MOCKED: JengaHQ payment (demo mode), AI generation (demo mode when XAI_API_KEY not set). The stripe package is still in requirements.txt but not imported - can be removed for cleanup.

mocked_features.JengaHQ payment: Demo mode when JENGA_API_KEY not set - auto-activates subscriptions
mocked_features.AI generation: Demo mode when XAI_API_KEY not set - returns demo content
